live_demo.role: Run the current edge on demo. AI does not need to beat this window to be built.

ai_build_collect.note: Single AI0 tester run, then split offline. Confirm last basket open_time is in 2025 before training. Larger tester deposit OK (ignore for strategy) — only so equity survives the full span.

train.role: Fit models / regime atlas / failure + health

holdout.role: Guardrail quality: catch bad paths, DD protection, skip/pause precision — NOT beat-PRODUCTION

optional_sanity.role: Later: shadow on demo-era data. Must not starve PRODUCTION. Not the AI build scoreboard.

success_means: Catches steamroller / BSL clusters on holdout
Trade count remains >= 85% of unfiltered holdout
Does not require PF > live PRODUCTION 2026 baseline
